name: Golden Smile Pawnshop Inc
description_short: Golden Smile Pawnshop INC is a pawn shop located in Harlem, New York offering collateral-based loans and jewelry/gold buying services.
description_long: Golden Smile Pawnshop INC operates as a traditional pawn shop in the Harlem neighborhood of Manhattan, specifically located at 29 West 125th Street. The business has established itself as a local financial services provider for consumers seeking quick access to cash through collateral-based lending. Like other pawn shops, the company provides immediate liquidity by accepting personal items of value as collateral. The business maintains consistent operating hours throughout the week, suggesting a stable, established operation serving the local community. Golden Smile Pawnshop INC appears to focus on serving customers in the upper Manhattan area who need fast cash solutions without credit checks or lengthy approval processes. What distinguishes this pawn shop is its prominent location in a densely populated urban area with high foot traffic, making it accessible to walk-in customers. The business is reachable by phone at (212) 831-2519 during operating hours, providing direct customer service. The company maintains regular weekday and Saturday hours, accommodating various consumer schedules. Operating pawn shops require state licensing and compliance with local regulations governing collateral loans, pawn transactions, and redemption rights. Golden Smile Pawnshop INC serves customers who need immediate cash and have items of value to pledge. This is best suited for consumers facing short-term financial needs, those without access to traditional credit, and individuals looking for a quick transaction without application processes. However, pawn loans involve surrendering personal possessions and come with redemption deadlines. Customers should understand that failure to reclaim items within the specified period results in forfeiture of those assets.
pros: Consistent operating hours from 9:30 AM to 6:30 PM seven days a week, including Saturday service
Convenient Harlem location at 29 W 125th Street accessible by public transportation
Direct phone contact available at (212) 831-2519 for customer inquiries
No credit checks required for pawn transactions
Immediate cash availability for customers with items of value
Established local business serving the upper Manhattan community
cons: Limited information available on the website about specific loan terms, interest rates, or redemption periods
No details provided about accepted collateral types or loan amount ranges
Risk of permanent loss of items if redemption deadlines are missed
Website is a Waze directions page rather than a dedicated business site with full service details
No transparency about fees, storage charges, or other transaction costs visible online
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash without credit approval
Individuals with valuable items seeking quick collateral-based loans
Local Harlem residents requiring fast, same-day cash access
diagnosis: Golden Smile Pawnshop INC is best for consumers in the Harlem area who need immediate cash and own items of value they can pledge as collateral. The main caveat is that pawning involves surrendering personal possessions with the risk of permanent loss if redemption deadlines are missed, and detailed information about terms, rates, and fees is not available online.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal collateral
